title: Valoria PvP V2 [16x]
description: A purple cartoon-ish themed PvP texture pack.
body:
Introducing Valoria V2, a purple themed pvp texture pack. Offering short swords, outlined ores, a transparent dark ui Interface, and more! Suitable for gamemodes like skywars, bedwars, duels, etc. Made by Eryndor Pixels and Shadow Eagle°
‎
